name: Highnote
description: Modern card issuing and acquiring platform with processor, program manager, and GraphQL API.

seo.title: Highnote — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Highnote: Modern card issuing and acquiring platform with processor, program manager, and GraphQL API.

when_to_use: Modern card issuing with GraphQL API for fintech card program builders
Acquiring and program manager in one platform for new card products
Visa/Mastercard card issuance with real-time spend controls via API
Embedded card product for vertical SaaS adding financial services

pros: GraphQL API is modern and flexible
Unified issuing + acquiring on one stack
cons: Higher minimums than Lithic or Marqeta
GraphQL learning curve for REST teams
review.verdict: Modern full-stack card platform worth it if you need issuing and acquiring unified under one processor.
review.best_for: US fintechs building both issuing and acceptance on a single modern stack
review.not_for: Early-stage teams wanting cheap virtual cards or non-US programs
